1.en: We have put together some functionality inside of our MCP server, but we have no idea if it works.
1.zh_tw: 我們在 MCP 伺服器中放了一些功能，但不知道它能不能用。
1.zh_cn: 我们在 MCP 服务器中放了一些功能，但不知道它能不能用。

2.en: So it'd be really great if we could test this out somehow. It turns out that by using this Python
2.zh_tw: 如果能以某種方式測試就太好了。原來使用這個 Python
2.zh_cn: 如果能以某种方式测试就太好了。原來使用这个 Python

3.en: SDK, we automatically get access to a in-browser debugger so we can make sure that this server is

3.zh_cn: SDK，我们自动可以访问一个浏览器內的除错器，确保服务器

4.en: working as expected. Let me show you how to use it really quickly. Back inside my terminal,
4.zh_tw: 正常運作。讓我快速展示怎麼使用。回到終端機，
4.zh_cn: 正常运作。让我快速展示怎麼使用。回到终端，

5.en: I'm going to make sure that I have my Python environment activated. Remember the readme

5.zh_cn: 确保啟动了 Python 环境。readme

6.en: document goes into detail on the exact command to run to make sure that you have activated

7.zh_tw: 確切指令。確定啟動後，跑 mcp dev 加上包含伺服器的檔案名稱。
7.zh_cn: 确切命令。确定啟动后，跑 mcp dev 加上包含服务器的文件名称。

8.en: of the file that contains our server. In this case, it is mcpserver.py. Once I run that, I'll then be

10.en: access it. I'm going to open up that address inside my browser, and once you go there, you'll see

23.en: working as expected. So this is how we can do some live development on our MCP server without

28.en: with the contents of the document. That is it right there. I can verify it. It's the same exact string
